creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
graphics/cal3d is a version from July 2006.
graphics/cal3d-devel is a version from July 2006.

The devel version looks to be the last version as well (and it's no longer on SF so it's metadata needs updating)

I think it's safe to say that cal3d is NOT in development, so I can't see a reason to have both ports.

Is there one?

If not, I suggest removing one of these.  (possibly updating cal3d to same as cal3d-devel and then deleted cal3d-devel)
